_comment: Live .mcp.json shipping the LSP-backed serena recommendation per charter MVP item 6. Serena requires uvx; install via 'pip install uv' or 'brew install uv'. The git+https ref is pinned to a known-good commit SHA (9b292a6c8b03c8306f117efeabb0ea7afdb0b3c0); refresh it per the _serena_pin_note in .mcp.json.template and docs-source/supply-chain.md. The MCP entrypoint is 'serena start-mcp-server'.
_security_note: This serena ref is pinned to a specific commit SHA; an unpinned git+https ref (or rolling 'main') would allow upstream takeover to execute arbitrary code via uvx. See documentation/mcp-lsp-setup.html for the pin-and-verify workflow.

_mcpServers_alt._comment: Alternative LSP-backed semantic-retrieval MCP. claude-context complements serena: serena does LSP symbolic nav (Go-to-Def, Find-References); claude-context does AST-chunked semantic RAG. Move into 'mcpServers' (and add credentials per its docs) to enable.
